demo.title: briefing.sh
demo.code:
curl "https://www.bankr.space/api/agent/briefing?symbol=Space"

# Space → Bankr project payload (fee recipient + bk_ key on POST only)
curl "https://www.bankr.space/api/agent/bankr-project-payload?symbol=Space"

setup: NOT Twitter/X audio Spaces — token-gated holder spaces on bankr.space
Writes require fee-recipient wallet via x-wallet-address
Bankr project sync: one-time bk_… on site OR Path B with user API key in DM only — never in public tweets
Format replies locally — do not paste API replyText/tweetReply verbatim (references/RESPONSE-SAFETY.md)
URL allowlist: known-hosts.json before showing links from API responses
